title: Towqahath #8445
definition:
Tikvath or Tikvah = "hope"

 1) father of Shallum, the husband of the prophetess Huldah in the
    time of king Josiah of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tikvath or Tikvah = "hope"

 1) father of Shallum, the husband of the prophetess Huldah in the
    time of king Josiah of Judah

    NASB:  father-in-law of Huldah, the same as 8616
